overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a rainy day walk through Los Santos. The player walks along city sidewalks, crosses a busy intersection, and passes various commercial storefronts during a heavy downpour with wet streets and reflections.

scene_state.functional_zone: parking garage sidewalk with palm tree landscaping

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk next to a parking garage during heavy rain

entered.detail: multi-level concrete parking structure with curved facade
row of palm trees lining the sidewalk
yellow fire hydrant on the sidewalk edge
large billboard with advertisements visible in the distance
tall construction crane visible above buildings
tall modern glass office tower in the background
white sports car parked near the garage entrance

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-soaked sidewalk beside a multi-level parking garage. Palm trees line the path and a white sports car is parked near the entrance. Heavy rain creates reflections on the wet concrete while a construction crane and glass skyscraper are visible in the hazy distance.

events.description: exits covered sidewalk area and approaches the intersection crosswalk
pedestrian crosses the street from right to left in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection, navigating around a pedestrian

notable_agents.action: man in dark clothing crossing the street from right to left

entered.detail: traffic signal pole at the intersection corner
gas station with yellow canopy and signage
commercial building with distinctive red awning

segments.scene_description: Approaching and crossing a busy urban intersection during heavy rain. The camera passes a gas station on the right and a building with a red awning on the left. A pedestrian crosses in front of the camera while vehicles wait at the traffic light. The wet asphalt reflects the gray sky and surrounding buildings.

events.description: red and white city bus passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past the red awning building

entered.detail: red and white public transit bus driving along the street
deciduous street tree in a concrete planter
triangular yield sign on a pole

segments.scene_description: Walking along the sidewalk past the red awning building, which recedes into the background. A city bus passes by on the wet street. The sidewalk features a street tree and various urban elements including a yield sign and newspaper vending machine.

agents.ego_description: walking past various storefronts and shops with neon signs

entered.detail: commercial building with stone facade and various signs
blue newspaper vending machine on the sidewalk
green neon sign in a shop window
bus stop shelter with glass panels

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrower sidewalk lined with various storefronts including a shop with a CASH HERE sign and ATM. The stone facade buildings feature neon signs and metal security gates. Cardboard boxes and a trash dumpster are visible on the sidewalk as the rain continues to fall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-drenched city, moving from an open parking area toward a dense corridor of urban storefronts. It begins by gliding along a rain-soaked sidewalk beside a multi-level parking garage and palm trees, with a white sports car parked nearby and a distant skyscraper looming through the haze. As the camera advances, the scene opens into a busy intersection where the wet asphalt reflects a gray sky, passing a gas station and a building with a red awning while vehicles wait at a traffic light. The movement then shifts past a passing city bus and urban fixtures like a yield sign and newspaper machine before the red awning recedes into the background. Finally, the path narrows into a street lined with stone facades, neon signs, and metal security gates, passing an ATM and a shop with a cash sign amidst cardboard boxes and a trash dumpster.
